sql_array: CREATE TABLE welch_ttest (id UInt32, sample_data Float64, sample_index Int8) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT welchTTest(welch_ttest.sample_data, welch_ttest.sample_index) FROM welch_ttest WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM welch_ttest WHERE sample_data < 15);
CREATE TABLE test_data (val Int32, str_val String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY val;
SELECT welchTTest(CAST(str_val AS Float64), val) FROM test_data WHERE val != ANY (SELECT val FROM test_data WHERE str_val IS NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT welchTTest(sample_data, sample_index) AS test_result FROM welch_ttest GROUP BY sample_index HAVING test_result.1 < 0.05);
CREATE TABLE user_data (user_id UInt32, score Float64, confidence_level Float64) ENGINE = Memory;

WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_data WHERE confidence_level != ANY (SELECT confidence_level FROM user_data WHERE score < 80.0)) AS count_subquery SELECT welchTTest(score, user_id) FROM user_data WHERE count_subquery > 0;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (num Int32, val Decimal(10, 2)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT welchTTest(val, num) FROM edge_cases WHERE num != ANY (SELECT num FROM edge_cases WHERE val = 0.00);
CREATE TABLE correlated_data (id UInt32, data Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT welchTTest(data, (SELECT id FROM correlated_data WHERE data > 15)) FROM correlated_data WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM correlated_data WHERE data < 12);
